title: Wholesome Turkish Rice Dolma
description: Citrusy, bouncy-qq Turkish stuffed peppers that act as a hangover cure with fermented kimchi and gelatin leafs for a low‑calorie, flavorful dinner.

ingredients.name: Gelatin sheets
ingredients.notes: soak in cold water 5 min then dissolve in hot broth

instructions: Heat olive oil in a saucepan, sauté onion and garlic until translucent.
Stir in tomato paste and rice, cooking for 2 minutes.
Add broth, bring to a boil, then reduce heat, cover, and simmer 15 minutes until rice is tender.
Fold in kimchi, lemon juice, orange zest, and pepper; stir.
Dissolve gelatin sheets into the hot rice mixture after soaking in cold water.
Spoon the rice mixture into the bell pepper halves and place them upright in a baking dish.
Cover with foil and bake 20 minutes, then remove foil and bake another 10 minutes until peppers are soft.
Let cool slightly, then serve warm with a squeeze of fresh lemon.
